name: Passwd and Shadow File Access on Linux
description: Detects access to /etc/passwd and /etc/shadow for credential harvesting. Covers cat/less/head reads, unshadow combinations, and file copy operations.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name : ("cat", "less", "more", "head", "tail", "cp", "base64") and process.args : ("/etc/shadow", "/etc/master.passwd")) or process.name == "unshadow" or (process.name == "cp" and process.args : "*shadow*"))
